_story: Provider submitted without required labs and only one step therapy agent. Returned immediately with specific checklist.
missing_items: HbA1c lab result (required: ≥7.5% within last 6 months) — NOT SUBMITTED
Fasting glucose lab result (required within last 6 months) — NOT SUBMITTED
Second-line step therapy agent (required: documented trial of metformin PLUS one of: SGLT-2 inhibitor, DPP-4 inhibitor, or sulfonylurea) — ONLY METFORMIN DOCUMENTED
